mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window despite rate declines.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and falling consumer spending, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in greater than 55 percent of triggered instances over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and business demand expansion, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations yield negative forward returns in greater than 60 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a tightening cycle reflects resilient supply-side capacity that offsets higher rates, generating positive short-term S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases during tightening yield negative 5-day returns in greater than 50 percent of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth above trend levels signals strong aggregate demand and corporate earnings expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over three months.
failure_condition: GDP growth above 2 percent annualized correlates with negative forward returns with Rank IC below negative 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating monthly inflation erodes real corporate margins and forces aggressive central bank tightening, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL spikes above threshold produce positive forward returns in greater than 65 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with falling unemployment rates confirm robust labor market tightening and wage growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative forward returns in greater than 55 percent of triggered months.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts during periods of financial stress signal collapsing credit availability and negative wealth effects, driving negative short-term S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: HOUST declines during stress periods correlate with positive 5-day returns in greater than 50 percent of cases.
